textPlain: > Doing a search for source code on Github reveals basically nothing. No blog posts. No source code repositories. Nothing.If nobody ever implemented it in C, it's questionable whether it ever happened at all.
I learned a lot from implementing this book. Compiler was in OCaml. Runtime was in C (used as a glorified assembly).
Have been many, for the book the post is reviewing, eg.https://github.com/abeln/ccBlogger just didn't look hard enough (or doesn't know that  search on GitHub is crippled, for reasons)
